fato_historico: 1983: An attack at Orly Airport in Paris is launched by Armenian militant organisation ASALA, leaving eight people dead and 55 injured.
energia_do_dia: As the mid-July sun glows, seek beauty in the quiet corners of your world. Much like the resilient spirit of Paris rising above shadows of the past, your heart may find strength in grace. Consider how peace ripples outward from your soul, bringing clarity to your relationships and a lovely four-leaf clover of luck to your path.
frase_do_dia: True balance is found when you choose love over the echoes of the past.
significado_numero: Represents the manifestation of your most creative and heart-centered intentions.
conselho: Practice mindful listening to turn every conversation into a bridge of understanding.
